A, C, and D are partial activities that don't represent the complete resource audit.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Oscar, director de IT en SeguroNet, quiere realizar un ejercicio de simulacion de incidentes de tipo funcional. A diferencia de un tabletop exercise, que caracteriza a un ejercicio funcional?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: Oscar, the IT director at SeguroNet, wants to conduct a functional incident simulation exercise. Unlike a tabletop exercise, what characterizes a functional exercise?
options_es: Solo se discute el escenario verbalmente sin ejecutar acciones
Los participantes ejecutan acciones reales en un entorno controlado, probando procedimientos operativos
Solo se revisan documentos de politicas sin interaccion
Se limita a una presentacion PowerPoint sobre incidentes
options_en: The scenario is only discussed verbally without executing actions
Participants execute real actions in a controlled environment, testing operational procedures
Only policy documents are reviewed without interaction
It is limited to a PowerPoint presentation about incidents
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. Un ejercicio funcional requiere que los participantes ejecuten acciones reales (aunque en entorno controlado), probando procedimientos operativos. A describe un tabletop exercise, C es una revision de documentos, y D no es un tipo de ejercicio de simulacion.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. A functional exercise requires participants to execute real actions (though in a controlled environment), testing operational procedures. A describes a tabletop exercise, C is a document review, and D is not a type of simulation exercise.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Segun EC-Council, que actividad del postmortem del incidente debe realizarse PRIMERO?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: According to EC-Council, which incident postmortem activity should be performed FIRST?
options_es: Definir las brechas y mejoras en la estrategia de gestion de incidentes
Divulgar el incidente publicamente
Contratar nuevo personal de seguridad
Actualizar las politicas de seguridad
options_en: Define gaps and improvements in the incident management strategy
Publicly disclose the incident
Hire new security staff
Update security policies
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. Segun la lista de sub-actividades post-incidente de EC-Council, definir brechas y mejoras para la estrategia de gestion de incidentes es la primera actividad. A (revision de politicas) viene despues, C (divulgacion) es posterior, y D no es una actividad post-incidente estandar.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. According to EC-Council's post-incident sub-activities list, defining gaps and improvements for the incident management strategy is the first activity. A (policy review) comes later, C (disclosure) is subsequent, and D is not a standard post-incident activity.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Angela, CISO de TechFin, esta evaluando si su equipo de IH&R necesita contratar consultores externos despues de un compromiso complejo. Segun las mejores practicas, en que circunstancia es MAS apropiado involucrar consultores externos?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: Angela, CISO of TechFin, is evaluating whether her IH&R team needs to hire external consultants after a complex compromise. According to best practices, under what circumstance is it MOST appropriate to involve external consultants?
options_es: Solo cuando la direccion ejecutiva lo solicita por razones de imagen
Nunca, ya que toda la respuesta debe ser interna
Cuando el incidente excede la capacidad tecnica o los recursos del equipo interno
Para todos los incidentes, sin importar su severidad
options_en: Only when executive management requests it for image reasons
Never, as all response should be internal
When the incident exceeds the internal team's technical capacity or resources
For all incidents, regardless of their severity
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. Los consultores externos se involucran cuando el incidente supera la capacidad tecnica o los recursos del equipo interno, como en ataques avanzados o situaciones que requieren especializacion forense. A es excesivo, C limita la decision a imagen, y D ignora la realidad de recursos limitados.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. External consultants are involved when the incident exceeds the internal team's technical capacity or resources, such as in advanced attacks or situations requiring forensic specialization. A is excessive, C limits the decision to image, and D ignores the reality of limited resources.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Segun EC-Council, que debe incluir la comunicacion asegurada (secured communication) del equipo IH&R?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: According to EC-Council, what should the IH&R team's secured communication include?
options_es: Mensajes en papel transmitidos por mensajero exclusivamente
Solo mensajes de texto sin cifrado
Comunicacion unicamente a traves de fax analogico
Una solucion de comunicacion que proteja la confidencialidad e integridad incluso si el atacante tiene acceso a la red
options_en: Paper messages transmitted by courier exclusively
Only text messages without encryption
Communication only through analog fax
A communication solution that protects confidentiality and integrity even if the attacker has network access
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. EC-Council indica que la comunicacion asegurada debe proteger la confidencialidad e integridad de la comunicacion del equipo incluso si el atacante aun tiene acceso a la red. A carece de seguridad, C y D son metodos obsoletos e impracticos como solucion principal.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. EC-Council states that secured communication should protect confidentiality and integrity of team communication even if the attacker still has network access. A lacks security, C and D are obsolete and impractical methods as a primary solution.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Pablo, gestor de incidentes en AeroSec, observa que la recuperacion de un incidente requiere recursos adicionales de socios externos pero el tiempo estimado es predecible. Segun NIST, como se clasifica esta recuperabilidad?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: Pablo, an incident manager at AeroSec, observes that recovery from an incident requires additional resources from external partners but the estimated time is predictable. According to NIST, how is this recoverability classified?
options_es: Suplementada
Extendida
No recuperable
Regular
options_en: Supplemented
Extended
Not Recoverable
Regular
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. 'Suplementada' indica que la organizacion necesita recursos adicionales de fuentes externas pero el tiempo de recuperacion es predecible. A (Regular) no necesita recursos externos, C (Extendida) tiene tiempo impredecible, y D (No recuperable) significa que no es posible.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. 'Supplemented' indicates the organization needs additional resources from external sources but recovery time is predictable. A (Regular) doesn't need external resources, C (Extended) has unpredictable time, and D (Not Recoverable) means it's not possible.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Segun EC-Council, que es lo que la fase de Preparacion establece como base para todo el proceso de IH&R?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: According to EC-Council, what does the Preparation phase establish as the foundation for the entire IH&R process?
options_es: Solo la creacion de un sitio web corporativo
Unicamente la compra de herramientas de seguridad
Solo la contratacion de personal temporal
Las reglas, politicas y procedimientos que impulsan el proceso de IH&R, junto con la construccion del equipo de respuesta
options_en: Only the creation of a corporate website
Only the purchase of security tools
Only the hiring of temporary staff
The rules, policies, and procedures that drive the IH&R process, along with building the response team
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. EC-Council establece que la Preparacion incluye definir reglas, politicas y procedimientos que guian el proceso de IH&R, ademas de construir y entrenar al equipo de respuesta. A, C y D son componentes parciales que no representan la base completa.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. EC-Council states that Preparation includes defining rules, policies, and procedures that guide the IH&R process, as well as building and training the response team. A, C, and D are partial components that don't represent the complete foundation.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Carmen, analista senior en BankDefense, esta realizando el proceso de evaluacion de impacto del incidente como parte de las actividades post-incidente. Que aspecto es el MAS importante a documentar?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: Carmen, a senior analyst at BankDefense, is performing the incident impact assessment process as part of post-incident activities. What aspect is MOST important to document?
options_es: El impacto economico, operativo y reputacional causado por el incidente
Las quejas personales de los miembros del equipo
Las preferencias de almuerzo del equipo durante el incidente
Solo el numero de horas extras trabajadas
options_en: The economic, operational, and reputational impact caused by the incident
Personal complaints from team members
The team's lunch preferences during the incident
Only the number of overtime hours worked
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. La evaluacion de impacto del incidente debe documentar los efectos economicos, operativos y reputacionales para cuantificar el dano total y justificar mejoras futuras. A y D son irrelevantes, y C es solo un dato operativo parcial.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. The incident impact assessment must document economic, operational, and reputational effects to quantify total damage and justify future improvements. A and D are irrelevant, and C is only a partial operational data point.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Segun EC-Council, que tipo de plantillas debe preparar el equipo IH&R como parte de los mecanismos de comunicacion interna?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: According to EC-Council, what type of templates should the IH&R team prepare as part of internal communication mechanisms?
options_es: Plantillas de marketing para redes sociales
Plantillas de correo electronico pre-establecidas para diferentes tipos de incidentes
Plantillas de diseno de logotipos corporativos
Plantillas de curriculums para nuevas contrataciones
options_en: Social media marketing templates
Pre-established email templates for different types of incidents
Corporate logo design templates
Resume templates for new hires
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. EC-Council recomienda que el equipo IH&R use plantillas de correo electronico pre-establecidas para diferentes tipos de incidentes, lo que facilita la comunicacion interna rapida y consistente. A, C y D no son mecanismos de comunicacion de IR.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. EC-Council recommends the IH&R team use pre-established email templates for different types of incidents, facilitating rapid and consistent internal communication. A, C, and D are not IR communication mechanisms.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Segun EC-Council, durante la fase de triaje, cual de los siguientes factores se evalua para determinar la prioridad de un incidente basandose en los efectos legales y regulatorios?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: According to EC-Council, during the triage phase, which of the following factors is evaluated to determine an incident's priority based on legal and regulatory effects?
options_es: El numero de seguidores de la empresa en redes sociales
El tamano fisico de los servidores afectados
La distancia geografica entre las oficinas de la organizacion
Los requisitos legales y regulatorios aplicables al tipo de datos comprometidos
options_en: The number of the company's social media followers
The physical size of the affected servers
The geographic distance between the organization's offices
The legal and regulatory requirements applicable to the type of compromised data
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. EC-Council establece que los requisitos legales y regulatorios son factores de priorizacion durante el triaje, especialmente cuando los datos comprometidos estan sujetos a regulaciones especificas. A, C y D no son factores de priorizacion de incidentes.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. EC-Council states that legal and regulatory requirements are prioritization factors during triage, especially when compromised data is subject to specific regulations. A, C, and D are not incident prioritization factors.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Hector, CISO de MineraSec, quiere implementar un playbook de SOAR para automatizar la respuesta a ataques de phishing. Cual de las siguientes acciones puede automatizarse tipicamente mediante SOAR?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: Hector, CISO of MineraSec, wants to implement a SOAR playbook to automate the response to phishing attacks. Which of the following actions can typically be automated through SOAR?
options_es: La negociacion de rescate con atacantes de ransomware
El bloqueo automatico de URLs maliciosas, el aislamiento de buzones afectados y la notificacion al equipo
La decision final de despedir empleados comprometidos
La aprobacion del presupuesto anual de seguridad
options_en: Ransom negotiation with ransomware attackers
Automatic blocking of malicious URLs, isolation of affected mailboxes, and team notification
The final decision to terminate compromised employees
The approval of the annual security budget
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. Los playbooks SOAR pueden automatizar acciones repetitivas como bloquear URLs, aislar buzones comprometidos y enviar notificaciones al equipo. A requiere decision humana de RRHH, C requiere negociadores humanos, y D es una decision de gestion no automatizable.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. SOAR playbooks can automate repetitive actions like blocking URLs, isolating compromised mailboxes, and sending team notifications. A requires human HR decision, C requires human negotiators, and D is a non-automatable management decision.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Segun EC-Council, cuando los miembros del CERT abandonan la organizacion, que procedimiento de salida es obligatorio?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: According to EC-Council, when CERT members leave the organization, which exit procedure is mandatory?
options_es: Revocar acceso a sistemas confidenciales, realizar entrevista de salida y anunciar el cambio a las partes interesadas
Unicamente eliminar su cuenta de correo electronico
Solo enviar un correo de despedida al equipo
No se requiere ningun procedimiento especial
options_en: Revoke access to confidential systems, conduct an exit interview, and announce the change to stakeholders
Only delete their email account
Only send a farewell email to the team
No special procedure is required
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. EC-Council especifica que al salir personal CERT se debe: revocar acceso (cambiar contrasenas, revocar certificados), registrar acciones, hacer backup de su trabajo, realizar entrevista de salida y anunciar el cambio. A y C son acciones parciales, y D ignora procedimientos de seguridad criticos.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. EC-Council specifies that when CERT personnel leave: revoke access (change passwords, revoke certificates), log actions, back up their work, conduct an exit interview, and announce the change. A and C are partial actions, and D ignores critical security procedures.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Segun EC-Council, en la fase de recuperacion, que debe verificarse tras restaurar un servicio afectado antes de declararlo operativo?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: According to EC-Council, in the recovery phase, what must be verified after restoring an affected service before declaring it operational?
options_es: Que el logotipo corporativo se muestra correctamente en el sitio web
Que el servicio funciona normalmente y obtener confirmacion positiva de cada parte involucrada
Solo que la IP del servidor es la misma
Solo que el servidor enciende correctamente
options_en: That the corporate logo displays correctly on the website
That the service functions normally and obtain positive confirmation from each involved party
Only that the server's IP is the same
Only that the server powers on correctly
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. EC-Council indica que es buena practica verificar el funcionamiento normal y obtener confirmacion positiva de cada parte de que todo opera normalmente. A y C son verificaciones parciales, y D no es una verificacion de seguridad relevante.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. EC-Council states it is good practice to verify normal functioning and get positive confirmation from each party that everything is operating normally. A and C are partial verifications, and D is not a relevant security verification.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Raquel, gestora de incidentes en DataSafe, descubre que el equipo IH&R uso el correo electronico corporativo estandar para comunicar detalles del incidente internamente. Segun EC-Council, por que esto es un problema?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: Raquel, an incident manager at DataSafe, discovers the IH&R team used standard corporate email to communicate incident details internally. According to EC-Council, why is this a problem?
options_es: Porque el correo corporativo es demasiado lento
Porque los correos no se pueden enviar fuera del horario laboral
Porque el atacante podria tener acceso a los canales de comunicacion normales de la organizacion
Porque el correo electronico no permite adjuntar archivos
options_en: Because corporate email is too slow
Because emails cannot be sent outside business hours
Because the attacker may have access to the organization's normal communication channels
Because email does not allow file attachments
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. EC-Council advierte que se debe evitar el correo y chat comunes porque el atacante podria tener acceso a la red y monitorear las comunicaciones. Se deben usar herramientas de comunicacion IR estandar fuera de banda. A, C y D son afirmaciones falsas.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. EC-Council warns that common email and chat should be avoided because the attacker may have network access and monitor communications. Standard out-of-band IR communication tools should be used. A, C, and D are false statements.

exam_questions_m2_extra.question_es: Segun EC-Council, cual de las siguientes es una de las 8 sub-actividades post-incidente que involucra la creacion de un documento que resume las acciones tomadas, los resultados y las recomendaciones?
exam_questions_m2_extra.question_en: According to EC-Council, which of the following is one of the 8 post-incident sub-activities that involves creating a document summarizing actions taken, results, and recommendations?
options_es: Creacion del Informe de Accion Posterior (AAR)
Contencion del incidente
Escaneo de vulnerabilidades
Implementacion de firewall
options_en: Creating the After-Action Report (AAR)
Incident containment
Vulnerability scanning
Firewall implementation
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_es: B es correcto. La creacion del AAR es la tercera sub-actividad post-incidente segun EC-Council, y documenta las acciones tomadas, los resultados y las recomendaciones de mejora. A es una fase anterior (Paso 5), C es una actividad tecnica, y D es una medida de seguridad preventiva.
exam_questions_m2_extra.explanation_en: B is correct. Creating the AAR is the third post-incident sub-activity per EC-Council, documenting actions taken, results, and improvement recommendations. A is a previous phase (Step 5), C is a technical activity, and D is a preventive security measure.
